option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: CI Pipeline on: push: branches: - main pull_request: branches: - main schedule: # Scheduled run for tests only (UTC) - cron: '*/5 * * * *'
jobs: build-and-deploy: if: github.event_name != 'schedule' runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout repository uses: actions/checkout@v2
# Fixed Java setup with proper cache configuration - name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v3 with: distribution: 'temurin' java-version: '17' # Remove the built-in Gradle cache option as it's causing issues # We'll handle Gradle caching separately
# Add explicit Gradle caching - name: Setup Gradle cache uses: actions/cache@v3 with: path: | ~/.gradle/caches ~/.gradle/wrapper key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }} restore-keys: | ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Build with Gradle run: ./gradlew build -x test
- name: Run tests run: ./gradlew test
- name: Set up Docker Buildx uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
# Docker layer caching - name: Cache Docker layers uses: actions/cache@v3 with: path: /tmp/.buildx-cache key: ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-${{ github.sha }} restore-keys: | ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-
- name: Build Docker images run: | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml build
- name: Start all services run: | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d
- name: Wait for services to be ready run: | echo "Waiting for services to be ready..." sleep 45 docker compose ps
- name: Verify services health run: | # Check if Product Service is up curl --retry 10 --retry-delay 5 --retry-connrefused http://localhost:8080/actuator/health || echo "Product Service health check failed"
# Check if Order Service is up curl --retry 10 --retry-delay 5 --retry-connrefused http://localhost:8081/actuator/health || echo "Order Service health check failed"
# Stop services after testing - name: Stop services if: always() run: | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml down
tests-scheduled: if: github.event_name == 'schedule' runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout repository uses: actions/checkout@v2
- name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v3 with: distribution: 'temurin' java-version: '17'
- name: Setup Gradle cache uses: actions/cache@v3 with: path: | ~/.gradle/caches ~/.gradle/wrapper key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }} restore-keys: | ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Run tests (scheduled) run: ./gradlew test

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: CI Pipeline on: push: branches: - main pull_request: branches: - main schedule: # Scheduled run for tests only (UTC) - cron: '*/5 * * * *' workflow_dispatch: # Allow manual trigger for testing
jobs: build-and-deploy: if: github.event_name != 'schedule' runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout repository uses: actions/checkout@v2
# Fixed Java setup with proper cache configuration - name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v3 with: distribution: 'temurin' java-version: '17' # Remove the built-in Gradle cache option as it's causing issues # We'll handle Gradle caching separately
# Add explicit Gradle caching - name: Setup Gradle cache uses: actions/cache@v3 with: path: | ~/.gradle/caches ~/.gradle/wrapper key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }} restore-keys: | ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Build with Gradle run: ./gradlew build -x test
- name: Run tests run: ./gradlew test
- name: Set up Docker Buildx uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
# Docker layer caching - name: Cache Docker layers uses: actions/cache@v3 with: path: /tmp/.buildx-cache key: ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-${{ github.sha }} restore-keys: | ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-
- name: Build Docker images run: | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml build
- name: Start all services run: | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d
- name: Wait for services to be ready run: | echo "Waiting for services to be ready..." sleep 45 docker compose ps
- name: Verify services health run: | # Check if Product Service is up curl --retry 10 --retry-delay 5 --retry-connrefused http://localhost:8080/actuator/health || echo "Product Service health check failed"
# Check if Order Service is up curl --retry 10 --retry-delay 5 --retry-connrefused http://localhost:8081/actuator/health || echo "Order Service health check failed"
# Stop services after testing - name: Stop services if: always() run: | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml down
tests-scheduled: if: github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout repository uses: actions/checkout@v2
- name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v3 with: distribution: 'temurin' java-version: '17'
- name: Setup Gradle cache uses: actions/cache@v3 with: path: | ~/.gradle/caches ~/.gradle/wrapper key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }} restore-keys: | ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Run tests (scheduled) run: ./gradlew test
